{{Infobox group
| name = High Councilors (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

''See also: [[High Councilors (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Councilors]] are the three primary leaders of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] and serve as the official voice for the [[Am’haranai]]. Known as [[Architects]], these individuals view themselves as the foundational designers and protectors of the Empire, acting as shepherds to guide its people. One notable member is [[Yala the High Mason]], who possesses significant authority within the [[Council of Architects]]. The council operates with a degree of secrecy, though they occasionally meet in the open around a white column. Their role involves high-level decision-making regarding the stability of the Empire, such as managing the transition of power following an Emperor's death and deciding whether to support a new ruler from among the [[Regents]]. They also oversee strategic efforts to dismantle imperial networks and prepare for the eventual return of the [[Great Elders]], whom they seek to contain or combat through various means.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|High [[Councilors]] stand except in certain special circumstances.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|High [[Councilors]] include [[Kerian]] and [[Tyril]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]]'s notes on the [[Sleepless]] were intended for the High [[Councilors]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|High [[Councilors]] brief [[Shera]] personally on missions.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The High [[Councilors]] stand around a table made of chalk.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The High [[Councilors]] sent [[Shera]] on her mission.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Councilors]] are a group mentioned by [[Shera]] during her travels. Within this body, three specific members serve as representatives for the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]]. During a meeting hosted by [[Shera]], these three councilors are found waiting at the front of the room. Previously, [[Lucan]] had prepared correspondence intended for them while harboring suspicions that their motivations might be driven by selfishness.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Three High [[Councilors]] represent the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] considered that the High [[Councilors]] might have had selfish motivations.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] prepared letters for the High [[Councilors]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Councilors]] are a group [[Shera]] mentions.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Three High [[Councilors]] wait at the front of [[Shera]]'s meeting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Thanks,” Shera said as soon as the High Councilors were far enough away.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
